_note: Animated cutouts over the no-assets base. Hero moon+fronds and the branch are EXTRACTED straight from the OG (Artboard 11@2.f5.png) with alpha='sky' (keep everything that isn't the blue sky) so they match the original exactly AND the moon sits BEHIND the fronds (the fronds are part of the moon-fronds extract).
